prestazioni: K20A2 (or K20A Type R for JDM models) engine swap with a custom-built 88mm bore, 97mm stroke forged internals from Toda Racing, including billet crankshaft, forged I-beam connecting rods, and forged 12.5:1 compression pistons, paired with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HyTech Exhausts, supporting 450whp on E85 fuel with a Hondata KPro V4 ECU managing a 20psi boost curve and individual cylinder fuel trims

Full titanium valvetrain upgrade with Supertech 1mm oversized intake valves (36mm), 1mm oversized sodium-filled exhaust valves (31mm), dual valve springs with titanium retainers, and Toda Racing Type R-spec camshafts (272° intake, 264° exhaust, 12.5mm lift) paired with a Toda Racing adjustable cam gear set for precise timing adjustments under forced induction

Custom 4-piston AP Racing CP8660 calipers with 330mm two-piece floating rotors (JDM-spec DC5 Type R front brake kit) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with a custom stainless steel braided brake line kit from Goodridge, and a Wilwood master cylinder for improved pedal feel and modulation under high-G cornering
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (DC5-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap and gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding

J's Racing 17x9.5 +45 ET front and 17x10.5 +38 ET rear forged aluminum wheels (DC5-specific fitment) wrapped in 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from Buddy Club for aggressive flush fitment and improved track stability

Custom carbon fiber front lip by Seibon Carbon, paired with a custom 3D-printed polycarbonate rear wing (DC5-specific) with an adjustable Gurney flap and integrated third brake light, mounted on a custom aluminum wing riser kit from Mugen for optimal downforce at high speeds
